business_ideas.idea: Digital mortgage platform bringing online lending to underserved borrowers
Homeowners insurance and auto insurance sold through mortgage distribution network
Residential solar financing business addressing electricity bill savings market
Diversified holding company combining mortgages, insurance, and energy services

predictions.text: The difference between rejection and results is simply how long you stick with it
Ethical underwriting discipline survives market crises better than aggressive lending
Market valleys create opportunity for companies with discipline and capital reserves
